title: Privacy Policy
description: Privacy policy for Melsta Studio's services
intro: Melsta Studio ("we", "our", or "us") values your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and share personal information when you use our website, mobile applications, and beauty service booking platform. It also describes your privacy rights and choices regarding your personal information.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.description: We collect the following types of personal information:

items.title: Account Information
items.description: Name, phone number, email address, account details, and profile information provided during registration or booking.

items.title: Usage Data
items.description: Information about your interactions with the platform, including bookings, service preferences, search activity, support requests, and usage patterns.

items.title: Technical Data
items.description: Device information, IP address, browser type, operating system, and application usage information.

items.title: Booking Information
items.description: Appointment details, event information, service preferences, booking addresses, and communications related to bookings made through the platform.

items.title: Service Provision
items.description: Provide, manage, coordinate, and improve beauty service bookings, artist matching, customer support, and platform operations.

items.title: Personalization
items.description: Personalize artist recommendations, service suggestions, booking experiences, and platform features.

items.title: Communication
items.description: Communicate regarding bookings, confirmations, reminders, support requests, platform updates, and marketing communications where permitted.

items.title: Legal Compliance
items.description: Comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: Sharing Your Information
sections.description: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your data with third parties:

items.title: Service Providers
items.description: For hosting, analytics, payment processing, customer support, communication services, and operational support.

items.title: Booking Fulfillment
items.description: Relevant booking details may be shared with artists and service partners solely for fulfilling customer bookings and providing requested services.

items.title: Legal Compliance
items.description: To comply with laws or respond to lawful requests.

sections.content: Personal information may be shared with service providers, payment partners, artists involved in fulfilling bookings, and government authorities where legally required. We do not sell personal information.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.description: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as required for legal and business purposes. Upon account deletion, data will be permanently removed from our systems, subject to legal obligations.

sections.title: Your Rights Under GDPR
sections.description: If you are located in the European Union, you have the following rights:

items.title: Access
items.description: Request a copy of your personal data.

items.title: Rectification
items.description: Correct inaccurate or incomplete information.

items.title: Erasure
items.description: Request the deletion of your personal data.

items.title: Restriction
items.description: Limit the processing of your data.

items.title: Portability
items.description: Receive your data in a machine-readable format.

items.title: Objection
items.description: Object to data processing for specific purposes.

highlight.title: How to Exercise Your Right to Be Forgotten
highlight.description: To request the deletion of your personal data, please log in to the app, go to https://app.melsta.studio/settings/account, and click on "Delete Account". Once you submit the request, your account and personal data will be scheduled for deletion within 30 days. If you log back into your account during this time, your deletion request will be canceled. You can also reach out to us at https://melsta.studio/contact for deletion requests or any other queries regarding your data privacy.

sections.title: Artist Information
sections.description: For artists applying to provide services through the platform, we may collect information required for onboarding, verification, compliance, payouts, and service management.

items.title: Verification Information
items.description: Identity documents, address information, profile information, photographs, and other onboarding information.

items.title: Payout Information
items.description: Bank account and payment information required for processing artist payouts.

sections.title: Security Measures
sections.description: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction. These include:

items.title: Encryption
items.description: Encryption of data in transit and at rest.

items.title: Access Controls
items.description: Access controls and regular security assessments.

sections.title: Updates to This Policy
sections.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The "Last updated" at the top of the policy indicates when it was last revised. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through our services.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.description: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, you can contact us at:

footer: By using Melsta Studio's services, you agree to this Privacy Policy and consent to the collection and use of information as described herein. Thank you for trusting Melsta Studio.
